methods.description: Process for calculating the surface area of anthers by considering them as cylinders and plotting against fresh weight.

steps.description: To calculate the surface area, the anthers were considered as cylinders.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate surface area of anthers as cylinders

steps.description: The anther surface area was then plotted against the corresponding fresh weight.
steps.searchable_summary: plot anther surface area against fresh weight

methods.description: Procedure for isolating and mapping the MS6021 locus on chromosome 9 using bulk segregation analysis and fine mapping.

steps.description: For primary mapping, bulk segregation analysis (BSA) was used to identify pleomorphic markers associated to MS6021.
steps.searchable_summary: perform bulk segregation analysis for MS6021

steps.description: The locus was first mapped between two simple sequence repeat (SSR) markers, 2-30 and 2-1, on the long arm of chromosome 9.
steps.searchable_summary: map MS6021 locus between SSR markers

steps.description: 998 individuals were used for fine mapping with pairs of primers (4-5, 4-49, 4-89, and 3-34).

methods.description: Procedure for extracting RNA from various plant tissues and performing quantitative real-time PCR.

steps.description: Total RNA was isolated from root, stem, leaf, silk, cob, pollen and different stages of anthers using the RNeasy Plant mini Kit (QIAGEN).
One microgram of total RNA was used to synthesis cDNA using RevertAid First Strand CDNA Synthesis Kit (THERMO).
qRT-PCR was performed on the Roche LightCycle480 system with SYBR Green Premix (TAKARA).

methods.description: Procedure for performing RNA in-situ hybridization on wild-type anthers at different developmental stages.

steps.description: Wild-type anthers at different developmental stages were fixed in FAA solution and then dehydrated in a gradient ethanol series.
steps.searchable_summary: fix and dehydrate anthers for in-situ hybridization

steps.description: After embedding in paraffin, 8 µm thick sections were obtained using a Leica microtome.
steps.searchable_summary: embed anthers in paraffin and section

steps.description: To generate anti-sense and sense probes, a 750-bp cDNA fragment was produced by PCR amplification.
steps.searchable_summary: produce cDNA fragment for probe generation

methods.description: Procedure for performing Western blot analysis on anther proteins from wild type and ms6021 mutant.

steps.description: Different developmental stages of anthers from wild type and the ms6021 mutant were grounded into a powder in liquid nitrogen.
steps.searchable_summary: grind anthers into powder in liquid nitrogen

steps.description: Total protein was isolated using Plant Protein Extraction Reagent (CW0885M) according to the manufacturer's protocol.
steps.searchable_summary: isolate total protein from anther powder

steps.description: A protein blot was performed using the Super Signal West Femto Maximum Sensitivity Substrate Kit (THERMO).
steps.searchable_summary: perform protein blot with Super Signal West Femto
